subject: Swift Trigger 1216864 is not an astrophysical event
submitter: Simone Dichiara at Pennsylvania State University <sbd5667@psu.edu>
body:
S. Dichiara (PSU) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Swift-BAT trigger 1216864 is also related to the ongoing star tracker loss-of-lock event, and is not of astrophysical interest.
